headline: Want Decades of Passive Income? 2 Stocks to Buy Right Now
summary: With attractive yields and impressive dividend histories, these two high-yield stocks could be passive income cornerstones.

headline: Southern Co. electricity sales soar on 42% data center growth
summary: The company has 28 large load projects representing 11 GW under contract, and Georgia Power’s first-quarter capital expenditures increased year over year from $1.6 billion to $2 billion.

headline: Southern Co (SO) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Growth and Strategic Advances
summary: Southern Co (SO) surpasses earnings expectations with robust sales growth and strategic initiatives, despite facing supply chain and regulatory challenges.
